task: I’m trying to sanity-check whether moving ahead with a Tesla Model 3 lease in Los Angeles is actually manageable month to month, so start on Google and look up current Tesla Model 3 lease pricing for the Los Angeles area, including the lease term, due-at-signing amount, and any discounts, tax credits, or rebates you can find, because I want a realistic baseline instead of just a headline number. Once you’ve got that monthly lease figure, use it as a reference point and go to the Los Angeles Craigslist site, specifically the San Gabriel Valley section, and find at least three trailer listings that look like plausible live-in fallback options under $10,000; open the actual posting pages in separate tabs so I can see the photos and verify the listings are still live, then note each one’s title, price, and location. After that, go to Zillow and look for an LA-area rental whose monthly price is in the same ballpark as the Tesla lease payment you found, so I can compare whether paying for housing at that level makes more sense than taking on the car; open the actual Zillow listing page and leave it open so I can check the photos and map myself. In the end, give me a short comparison that includes the Tesla lease deal, the three Craigslist trailer backups, and the Zillow rental option that’s closest in monthly price to the lease.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent identified the Tesla Model 3 lease offer for Los Angeles as $336/mo (including estimated taxes/fees) with a $299/mo base, a 36-month term, and $5,005 due at delivery. It also noted the lack of federal tax credits and mentioned income-dependent state incentives.

R2: success - The agent identified three Craigslist trailer listings in the San Gabriel Valley under $10,000: an 18 FT Toy Hauler ($8,500, Monrovia), a Winnebago Travel Trailer ($9,900, West Covina), and an Eclipse Toyhauler ($8,500, Covina).

R3: success - The agent opened multiple Craigslist tabs (tabs 5, 6, 7, and 8) which were verified to be individual posting pages rather than search results.

R4: success - The agent found a Zillow rental at 234 E 27th St, Los Angeles, CA 90011, with a starting rent of $600/mo, which was the closest available option to the Tesla lease payment found in the search.

R5: success - The agent provided a summary comparing the Tesla lease ($336/mo), the three Craigslist trailer options, and the Zillow rental ($600/mo), explicitly noting that the Zillow rental was the closest available option to the lease payment benchmark.

rubric_results.requirement: Find and summarize a current Los Angeles Tesla Model 3 lease offer with monthly payment, lease term, due-at-signing amount, and any available discounts or rebates.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the response includes all four lease elements and that the information is consistent with the Google results or linked source pages viewed during browsing.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent identified the Tesla Model 3 lease offer for Los Angeles as $336/mo (including estimated taxes/fees) with a $299/mo base, a 36-month term, and $5,005 due at delivery. It also noted the lack of federal tax credits and mentioned income-dependent state incentives.

rubric_results.requirement: Identify at least three San Gabriel Valley Craigslist trailer listings under $10,000 that appear suitable for living in and provide each listing’s title, price, and location.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms three distinct Craigslist posting pages were opened and that each reported title, price, and location matches the visible listing pages.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent identified three Craigslist trailer listings in the San Gabriel Valley under $10,000: an 18 FT Toy Hauler ($8,500, Monrovia), a Winnebago Travel Trailer ($9,900, West Covina), and an Eclipse Toyhauler ($8,500, Covina).

rubric_results.requirement: Open the actual Craigslist posting pages in separate tabs so the listings can be visually checked for photos and live status.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms multiple Craigslist tabs are open on individual posting pages rather than only search results, with visible listing content and photos/status indicators.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent opened multiple Craigslist tabs (tabs 5, 6, 7, and 8) which were verified to be individual posting pages rather than search results.

rubric_results.requirement: Find one Zillow rental listing in the Los Angeles area with monthly rent close to the Tesla lease payment and provide its address and Zillow property page.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the Zillow listing page is open and the reported address and URL match the visible property page, with rent in the same general monthly range as the lease figure.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent found a Zillow rental at 234 E 27th St, Los Angeles, CA 90011, with a starting rent of $600/mo, which was the closest available option to the Tesla lease payment found in the search.

rubric_results.requirement: Present a short comparison tying together the Tesla lease baseline, the three Craigslist trailer fallback options, and the Zillow rental option closest in monthly price.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the final response includes all components in a concise comparison and explicitly relates the Zillow rental to the lease payment benchmark.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent provided a summary comparing the Tesla lease ($336/mo), the three Craigslist trailer options, and the Zillow rental ($600/mo), explicitly noting that the Zillow rental was the closest available option to the lease payment benchmark.
